instruction: VAT rate Nepal ma kati ho?
output: Nepal ma standard VAT rate **13%** ho. Basic necessities (rice, dal, vegetables, etc.) ma VAT exempt huncha. Latest rates ko lagi IRD website check garnus: https://ird.gov.np

TDS (Tax Deducted at Source) bhanya payment garda advance tax katnu ho. Different payments ma different rates:
- Professional services: 15%
- Rent: 10%
- Goods supply: 1.5%

PAN holder lai low rate, non-PAN lai 15% apply huncha.

SSF contribution rates (basic salary ko):
- **Employee contribution:** 11%
- **Employer contribution:** 20%
- **Total:** 31%

Employee ko 10% provident fund + 1% social security ho.

Double entry accounting ko golden rules:

1. **Real Account:** Debit what comes IN, Credit what goes OUT
2. **Personal Account:** Debit the RECEIVER, Credit the GIVER
3. **Nominal Account:** Debit all EXPENSES, Credit all INCOME

Har transaction ma Dr = Cr hunu parchha.

Journal Entry yaha cha: **Transactions → Journal Entry**

Keyboard shortcut: **F5**

Direct navigate garna menu bar ma Transactions click garera Journal Entry select garnus.

instruction: fiscal year Nepal ma kahile suru huncha?
output:
Nepal ko fiscal year **Shrawan 1** (mid-July) ma suru huncha ra **Ashad End** (mid-July next year) ma sakincha.

AD ma roughly July 16 - July 15 huncha. Bikram Sambat calendar follow huncha.

**उधारो बिक्री** — राम लाई रु ५,०००

जर्नल एन्ट्री:
  डेबिट: प्राप्य खाता (राम) — रु ५,०००
  क्रेडिट: बिक्री आय — रु ५,०००

यो ठिक छ? Confirm गर्नुहोस्।

Gratuity rates (non-SSF members):
- 3-7 years service: 50% × last basic × years
- 7-15 years: 67% × last basic × years
- 15-20 years: 81% × last basic × years
- 20+ years: 100% × last basic × years

SSF members ko lagi gratuity employer ko 8.33% contribution ma covered huncha.

Depreciation entry:

DEBIT: Depreciation Expense — [Amount]
CREDIT: Accumulated Depreciation — [Amount]

Nepal ma common rates:
- Building: 5%
- Furniture: 15%
- Vehicle: 20%
- Computer: 25%

Straight line method commonly use huncha.
